title: feat: add pinned news section to news banner
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Pinning the good stuff
gist.blurb: We've added a pinned section to the news banner so you never miss the biggest updates. Now the most important model drops and features stay right at the top where they belong.
gist.summary: Added a pinned news section to the frontend news banner to highlight major announcements like new model launches.
gist.impact: Users will now see the most important updates pinned in a highlighted violet box at the top of the news banner, ensuring major releases aren't missed.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee pinning an important news bulletin to a digital board, with the Monitor Robot reading it excitedly. Represents the new pinned news banner feature.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning a glowing violet news bulletin to a digital community board. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head reads the board excitedly, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'NEWS'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
